scope: x-domain decomposition with periodic halo exchange
hardware_target: single-node 8xH200 DGX-class system; multi-node requires separate fabric proof

communication_volume_formula.x_face_3d_field_bytes_per_rank_per_refre: approximately 2 * halo_width * ny * nz * dtype_bytes; interior boundary duplicate is excluded from sends

projection.weak_scaling: Expected to be favorable when each rank keeps local_owned_x much larger than 2 * halo_width; halo memory overhead falls below 2.5% once local_owned_x >= 256 for width 3.
projection.strong_scaling: Upper bound is num_partitions before halo and collective costs. No speedup number is claimed without real DGX profiler artifacts.
projection.multi_node: Correctness path should extend through JAX distributed pmap semantics, but InfiniBand/NCCL behavior is unproven until real multi-node smoke runs.

not_a_measurement: No NVLink, NVSwitch, NCCL, or InfiniBand measurements were taken.
No full sharded operational forecast wall-clock measurement is claimed.
